event.desc: A massive dust storm engulfs the colony

diary_entries.entry: The dust_storm changed everything. I feel pragmatic about our future here.
Year 26 on Mars. A massive dust storm engulfs the colony. Morale is hopeful. We have 1456 food units left.
Population: 16. A massive dust storm engulfs the colony. I spent the year on coding. Closest to Orion-12.
